title: CandidateMappingRule
description: Schema for candidate mapping rules. S22F artifact.

status.description: Must be bootstrap for S22F artifacts.

productionRuntime.description: Must be false for S22F artifacts.

ruleType.description: Classification of the rule, e.g. title_keyword, structural, heuristic.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule maps.

sourcePatterns.description: Source patterns (title keywords) that trigger this rule.

targetDomainTags.description: Domain tags assigned by this rule.

targetQuestionKindTags.description: Question kind tags assigned by this rule.

confidenceSignal.description: Confidence level of this mapping rule.
